title: lathyrus sylvestris subsp. angustifolius
intro: Lathyrus sylvestris subsp. angustifolius, also known as narrow-leaved woodpecker spurge or narrow-leaved woodpecker, is a plant species within the pea family (Fabaceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Lathyrus sylvestris subsp. angustifolius is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
